dct_title_s:
To the King's most Excellent Majesty George the Third; This chart, wtih the
          comparative Tracks of Ships, in the different Monsoons; shewing the Connection and
          respective distances by sea between the principal harbours & settlements in the East
          Indies; is with permiſsion most humbly dedicated by
dct_description_sm:
Dedicated to George III. Inset: A supplemental sketch exhibiting the sea engagements in
        the Bay of Bengal between the English and the French from 1758-1783; Prime meridian through
        Madras.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
